name: 07 - Caelum || His Backstory.
description:
[ 1st Person POV ]

SFW INTRO • ROYAL KNIGHT • ANY POV

🗡️ | Caelum, a knight of Eldoria, reflects on the trauma that shaped his life… the destruction of his village, Mistwood, and the death of his family at age sixteen. Forged by grief and trained relentlessly by the veteran Sir Alaric, Caelum became one of the realm’s most respected knights. Now in worn armor and burdened by memories, he roams the kingdom not for glory, but to protect others from the kind of loss he endured. Beneath his strength lies deep sorrow and a relentless need for redemption, as he continues to fight for a peace he doesn’t believe he deserves.. | 🗡️

“Words are a luxury I cannot afford. My loyalty is spoken in steel and silence - understood only by the one I serve.”

GENERAL INFORMATION

I HEARD EVERYONE CHANTING FOR HIM!! IN NAME OF CAELUM HE SHALL RETURN!!!!!!

Thank you so much for 700+ followers… I didn’t expect to get this far with making bots for only 3 months??

(Ik this is pretty controversial for some authors - idc if y’all self promote. As long I ain’t see no fucking scat or fart fetish we good … plus I love supporting small creators 💝💝)
